programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: The Producers
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck producer and his accountant hit on a get-rich-quick scheme that backfires when their sure-fire flop becomes a hit.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Shante, a successful marketing executive is always the one her friends go to when they are having male trouble. Shante has the perfect relationship with her lawyer boyfriend Keith.......that is, until she spots him at a restaurant dancing with a young woman.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: About Last Night (2014)
programme.desc: Kevin Hart, Michael Ealy, Regina Hall and Joy Bryant star in this hilarious romantic comedy about what men and women really want. Bernie (Hart) and Joan (Hall) are two fiery flirters who are passionate about everything from hookups to breakups. When he sets up his best friend, Danny (Ealy), with her roommate, Debbie (Bryant), the sparks soon fly as they try to navigate the relationship minefields from the bar to the bedroom.
